textadventure.entities.Item

Description
textadventure.entities
 
textadventure.logic
 

  • Uses of Item in textadventure.entities

    Methods in textadventure.entities that return types with arguments of type Item
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Item>
    Player.getInventory()
    Gets the list of items in the player's inventory.
    List<Item>
    Room.getItems()
    Gets the list of items in the room.
    Methods in textadventure.entities with parameters of type Item
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Room.addItem(Item item)
    Adds an item to the room.
    void
    Player.addItemToInventory(Item item)
    Adds an item to the player's inventory.
    void
    Room.removeItem(Item item)
    Removes an item from the room.
    void
    Player.removeItemFromInventory(Item item)
    Removes an item from the player's inventory.

    Methods in textadventure.logic that return types with arguments of type Item
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Item>
    Inventory.getItems()
    Gets the list of items currently in the inventory.
    Methods in textadventure.logic with parameters of type Item
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Inventory.addItem(Item item)
    Adds an item to the player's inventory.
    void
    Inventory.removeItem(Item item)
    Removes an item from the player's inventory if it exists.
